global_options.name: --agent
global_options.description: Emit the stable agent envelope JSON output.

global_options.name: --output <mode>
global_options.description: Select output mode: text, table, json, quiet, or agent.

global_options.name: --interactive
global_options.description: Hint to launch the Ink human renderer (only valid in text mode on a TTY).

global_options.name: --no-interactive
global_options.description: Force the plain text renderer; suppress Ink even when stdin/stdout is a TTY.

global_options.name: --experimental
global_options.description: Permit invocation of hidden experimental commands.

commands.name: init
commands.usage: atomicmemory init [--profile NAME] [--api-url URL] [--provider atomicmemory|mem0] [--user USER]
commands.summary: Write or update local CLI config.

commands.name: doctor
commands.summary: Validate config, profile, provider connectivity, package health, and integration readiness.

commands.name: status
commands.summary: Report active provider, profile, scope, and capabilities.

commands.name: config
commands.summary: Manage local CLI config and named profiles.

children.name: show
children.summary: Show merged config with secrets redacted.

children.name: profile show
children.summary: Show one profile with secrets redacted; defaults to the active profile.

commands.name: skill
commands.summary: Expose bundled, version-matched agent instructions for this CLI.

children.name: path
children.summary: Print the installed skill file path.

commands.name: hooks
commands.summary: Generate coding-agent hook config and run the bundled Node hook runtime.

commands.name: validate
commands.summary: Validate installed CLI package metadata, command spec, schema, and bundled skill. Offline by default; --online additionally checks provider connectivity/auth.

commands.name: add
commands.summary: Ingest text into memory.

commands.name: ingest
commands.summary: Explicit ingest command for text, messages, or verbatim storage.

commands.name: search
commands.summary: Search scoped memories. --threshold is intentionally omitted in v5 because raw similarity scores are not comparable across providers.

commands.name: package
commands.summary: Build prompt-ready context from scoped memories.

commands.name: list
commands.summary: List scoped memories.

commands.name: get
commands.summary: Fetch one memory by id.

commands.name: delete
commands.summary: Delete one memory by id.

commands.name: import
commands.summary: Bulk import JSON memory records.

commands.name: completion
commands.summary: Generate shell completion scripts. Fish and PowerShell completions are V1.1.

commands.name: version
commands.summary: Print CLI version.

commands.name: help
commands.summary: Show human or machine-readable help.

commands.name: lifecycle
commands.summary: [experimental] AtomicMemory memory lifecycle operations. Requires --experimental and the atomicmemory.lifecycle SDK extension.

commands.name: audit
commands.summary: [experimental] Inspect AtomicMemory audit trail. Requires --experimental and the atomicmemory.audit SDK extension.

commands.name: lessons
commands.summary: [experimental] Inspect durable lessons. Requires --experimental and the atomicmemory.lessons SDK extension.

commands.name: agents
commands.summary: [experimental] Inspect agent trust and conflicts. Requires --experimental and the atomicmemory.agents SDK extension.
